title: POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: COLONIA LIBERTAD POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth with mentoring, tutoring, and case management to help them graduate, find stable employment, and housing. Offers after-school programs, volunteer opportunities, and leadership development. 2921 Saddle Club Street SE #1009 Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Strengthening Families: Ages 10-14 and their parents Hours: Monday-Thursday noon-6pm Email (503) 315-2290 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 315-2290 Main phone (971) 599-5375 FAX Main phone (503) 315-2290 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment. Walk-ins may be accepted on a case-by-case basis. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday noon-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The office is located in the main building of the Colonia Libertad apartment complex. Enter the main building through a side door on Saddle Club Road or through the main entrance across from the children's playground. Parking is available in the spaces labeled OFFICE or along Saddle Club Street. Bus Route #11 Services: Case/Care Management * Adolescents Mentoring Programs Tutoring Services Youth Employment Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY WELLNESS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLONIA LIBERTAD
